name: @openhoo/digihoo
description: TypeScript SDK for Digi-Key API authentication and Product Information endpoints.

scripts.generate:types: mkdir -p src/generated && swagger2openapi --outfile /tmp/digikey-product-search-openapi.json https://developer.digikey.com/node/2357/oas-download && openapi-typescript /tmp/digikey-product-search-openapi.json --output src/generated/product-search-v4.ts && swagger2openapi --outfile /tmp/digikey-product-change-notifications-openapi.json https://developer.digikey.com/node/3668/oas-download && openapi-typescript /tmp/digikey-product-change-notifications-openapi.json --output src/generated/product-change-notifications-v3.ts
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
scripts.verify: npm run generate:types && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
